name: @w3t-ab/sqeave
description: A squint-cljs based solid-js framework for building SPAs borrowing ideas from Fulcro.
author: W3T AB

scripts.build:main: cd src/main && squint compile **/**/*.cljs && mkdir -p ../../dist/main && cp -R w3t_ab/sqeave/export ../../dist/main/
scripts.build:squint: pnpm build:main && pnpm build:devtools && pnpm build:components && pnpm build:cljc && pnpm build:assets
scripts.watch:squint: concurrently -k -n main,devtools,components,cljc,exports -c blue,magenta,green,yellow,cyan "pnpm watch:main" "pnpm watch:devtools" "pnpm watch:components" "pnpm watch:cljc" "pnpm watch:exports"
scripts.watch: pnpm clean && pnpm build:squint && concurrently -k "pnpm watch:squint" "pnpm watch:vite"
scripts.test:build: cd src/test && squint compile **/**/*.cljs && cp -r w3t_ab/sqeave/data dist/test/w3t_ab/sqeave
scripts.postbuild:devtools-css: mv dist/bundle/devtools.mjs dist/bundle/devtools.raw.mjs && printf 'import "./sqeave.css";\nexport * from "./devtools.raw.mjs";\n' > dist/bundle/devtools.mjs
scripts.postbuild:components-css: mv dist/bundle/components.mjs dist/bundle/components.raw.mjs && printf 'import "./sqeave.css";\nexport * from "./components.raw.mjs";\n' > dist/bundle/components.mjs
scripts.build: pnpm build:squint && pnpm build:assets && pnpm build:bundle && pnpm postbuild:devtools-css && pnpm postbuild:components-css && pnpm build:cljc
